content.content: Your questions have been answered: "What would you like to configure?"="Environment / model / behavior". You can now continue with these answers in mind.

options.description: Run a command automatically on an event — e.g. format after edits, run tests on save, log bash commands, prompt before compaction.
options.label: A hook (automation)

options.description: Allow/deny/ask rules so certain tools (e.g. git, npm) run without prompting, or are blocked.
options.label: Permissions

options.description: Env vars, default model, attribution text, MCP server toggles, or other simple settings.
options.label: Environment / model / behavior

options.description: A different setting — describe what behavior you want and I'll find the right key.
options.label: Something else
